name: Alert: Biblioboard audiobooks: Check of Cancel button after Return button tapping
fullName: My books module: Alert: Biblioboard audiobooks: Check of Cancel button after Return button tapping
statusMessage: 'Magic's Daughter. Audiobook.' book with specific action button is not present on books screen

java.lang.AssertionError: 'Magic's Daughter. Audiobook.' book with specific action button is not present on books screen

steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
And  I search for "Magic's Daughter" and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  AUDIOBOOK book with LISTEN action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen
steps.statusMessage: 'Magic's Daughter. Audiobook.' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'Magic's Daughter. Audiobook.' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BooksSteps.isBookPresent(BooksSteps.java:93)
	at ✽.AUDIOBOOK book with LISTEN action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/MyBooks.feature:163)

steps.name: When  Open AUDIOBOOK book with LISTEN action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click RETURN button but cancel the action by clicking CANCEL button on the alert
Then  AUDIOBOOK book with LISTEN action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen
